parameters.query: SELECT ot.id as opp_id, ot.opp_title, ot.agency, ot.estimated_value, ot.gda_score, ot.solicitation_number, ot.response_deadline, cp.id as plan_id, cp.opportunity as plan_opp FROM gda_opportunity_tracker ot JOIN gda_capture_plans cp ON (ot.opp_title ILIKE cp.opportunity OR ot.solicitation_number = (cp.plan_data->>'solicitation_number')) WHERE ot.last_refreshed > COALESCE(ot.last_synced_at, '2020-01-01'::timestamp) AND ot.last_refreshed > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' LIMIT 20

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, direction: 'opp_to_cap', source: 'change-detector', opp_id: $json.opp_id, plan_id: $json.plan_id, changes: { opp_title: $json.opp_title, agency: $json.agency, estimated_value: $json.estimated_value, gda_score: $json.gda_score, solicitation_number: $json.solicitation_number, response_deadline: $json.response_deadline } }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ 'UPDATE gda_opportunity_tracker SET last_synced_at = NOW() WHERE id = ' + $json.opp_id }}
